StringTokenizer st;

items.label: sb
items.documentation: Build result string then print once — faster than many println

items.label: sbw
hmiter
pq
items.documentation: poll() returns minimum. O(log n) offer/poll.

items.label: stack
items.insertText:
Deque<${1:Integer}> ${2:stk} = new ArrayDeque<>();
// push: stk.push(x)   pop: stk.pop()   peek: stk.peek()

items.label: mono
uf
bs
sliding
bfs
bfsgrid
dfs
prefix
dijkstra
topo
gcd
items.insertText:
static long gcd(long a, long b) { return b==0 ? a : gcd(b,a%b); }
static long lcm(long a, long b) { return a/gcd(a,b)*b; }

items.label: modpow
bitmask
bits
Arrays.sort
items.documentation: O(n log n) dual-pivot quicksort. For Object[] uses TimSort.

items.label: Arrays.fill
items.documentation: Fill entire array with value. O(n).

items.label: Arrays.copyOf
items.documentation: Returns new array. Truncates or pads with 0.

items.label: Arrays.binarySearch
items.documentation: Must be sorted first. Returns index or -(insertion point)-1.

items.label: Arrays.equals
items.documentation: Element-wise equality. DO NOT use == on arrays.

items.label: Collections.sort
items.documentation: Sort List in natural order. O(n log n).

items.label: Collections.reverseOrder
items.documentation: Comparator for descending. Use in PriorityQueue for max-heap.

items.label: Collections.swap
items.documentation: Swap elements at i and j.

items.label: Collections.nCopies
items.documentation: List of n copies of val.

items.label: Math.pow
items.documentation: a^b as double. Use modpow for (a^b)%mod.

items.label: Integer.parseInt
items.documentation: Parse String to int. Throws NumberFormatException if invalid.

items.label: Integer.compare
items.documentation: Safe int comparison. Use instead of a-b in comparators (avoids overflow).

items.label: String.valueOf
items.documentation: Convert any value to String. Null-safe.

items.label: Character.isLetter
items.documentation: True if c is a-z or A-Z.

items.label: Integer.MAX_VALUE
items.documentation: Maximum int value. Use as initial minimum in problems.

items.label: INF
items.documentation: Use as initial 'infinity' for shortest path, etc.

items.label: String
items.documentation:
Immutable sequence of chars.
Methods: length() charAt(i) substring(a,b) contains() split() trim() toCharArray() equals() compareTo()

items.label: Integer
items.documentation:
Wrapper for int.
MAX_VALUE MIN_VALUE parseInt() bitCount() toBinaryString() compare()

items.label: Long
items.documentation:
Wrapper for long.
MAX_VALUE MIN_VALUE parseLong() compare()

items.label: Math
items.documentation: max() min() abs() sqrt() pow() floor() ceil() round() log() PI

items.label: Scanner
items.documentation: nextInt() nextLong() nextDouble() next() nextLine() hasNext()

items.label: Arrays
items.documentation: sort() fill() copyOf() toString() binarySearch() equals() asList()

items.label: Collections
items.documentation: sort() reverse() shuffle() min() max() frequency() reverseOrder() swap()

items.label: StringBuilder
items.documentation: append() insert() delete() reverse() toString() length() charAt() setCharAt()

items.label: HashMap
items.documentation: O(1) avg get/put. getOrDefault() merge() computeIfAbsent()

items.label: TreeMap
items.documentation: Sorted keys. floorKey() ceilingKey() firstKey() lastKey()

items.label: LinkedHashMap
items.documentation: HashMap preserving insertion order. Used for LRU cache.

items.label: TreeSet
items.documentation: Sorted unique. floor() ceiling() first() last()

items.label: PriorityQueue
items.documentation: Default min-heap. poll()=min. Use Collections.reverseOrder() for max-heap.

items.label: ArrayDeque
items.documentation: Preferred over Stack and LinkedList for queue/stack.

items.label: Set
items.documentation: Unique elements. Impl: HashSet TreeSet LinkedHashSet

items.label: stream()
items.documentation: Start a stream pipeline. Chain filter/map/collect.

items.label: mapToInt
items.documentation: Use for sum/average on int values.

items.label: anyMatch
items.documentation: True if any element matches predicate. Short-circuits.

items.label: reduce
items.documentation: Fold all elements into one value.

items.label: Function
items.documentation: apply() — transform T to R. Compose with andThen()/compose()

items.label: Supplier
items.documentation: get() — produce T with no input

items.label: UnaryOperator
items.documentation: Function<T,T> — same type in and out

items.label: List.of
items.documentation: Creates immutable List. Cannot add/remove. NullPointerException on null elements.

items.label: Map.of
items.documentation: Up to 10 key-value pairs. Use Map.ofEntries() for more.

items.label: var
items.documentation: Compiler infers type from right-hand side. Only for local variables.

items.label: varex
items.documentation: Type inferred: var list = new ArrayList<String>() → ArrayList<String>

items.label: str.isBlank
items.documentation: True if empty or only whitespace. Like isEmpty() but includes whitespace.

items.label: Files.readString
items.documentation: Read entire file to String in one call.

items.label: Predicate.not
items.documentation: Negation of a predicate. e.g. Predicate.not(String::isEmpty)
